    S

    saveBooking(Booking) - Static method in class com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.database.DatabaseConnection
    Saves a booking to the database along with its Event information, Seating Configurations, Contract and Invoice Rolls back if unsuccessful
    saveDiaryNote(DiaryNote) - Static method in class com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.database.DatabaseConnection
    Stores a given note in the database
